SoldierRecommendBuilds.1.1: [3 New Star, 3 Dead Shot] New Star Guild: Balanced and All-Rounded
SoldierRecommendBuilds.1.2: Noya stacks Daisy effect. Paired with Dead Shot's Crit buffs and Divine Favor's effects, it's a balanced build.
SoldierRecommendBuilds.2.1: [3 Petal Bloom, 3 Apex Warrior] Petal Bloom: Survival and Stacking
SoldierRecommendBuilds.2.2: With Apex Warrior stacking Warrior Momentum, paired with Petal Bloom's high Skill DMG, this build deals top-tier Skill DMG burst. Chitose's Freelance Trekker doubles the team's stats, while Post Haste slows the enemies with frost, and Survival Expert stacks HP for sustain.
SoldierRecommendBuilds.3.1: [5 Grace Imperium, 4 Divine Favor] Grace Imperium: DoT Burst
SoldierRecommendBuilds.3.2: Canace leads by inflicting Grace Marks for continuous DMG, detonates 5 stacks for 10x burst DMG, supplemented by Divine Favor's warrior effects and Charm Aura for reliable crowd control, dealing top-tier DPS output.
SoldierRecommendBuilds.4.1: [5 Ashwind Clan, 4 United Force] Ashwind Clan: Besiege
SoldierRecommendBuilds.4.2: With Vollara as the core, this build applies Besieged Marks to buff Auto Attacks and boost Energy Regen. Paired with United Force to maximize Team ATK and Crit, forming an Auto Attack-focused, steamrolling formation.
SoldierRecommendBuilds.5.2: Once frontline pieces are defeated, Sherlock steps in to inherit the high stats from Forest Friends. Seven Forest Friends pieces ensure massive Energy Regen, enabling infinite spamming of single-target burst.
SoldierRecommendBuilds.6.1: [4 Gear Spinner, 3 Grace Imperium] Gear Spinner Sustain DoT
SoldierRecommendBuilds.6.2: Gear Spinner's shields and the maintenance program provide team-wide healing and survivability. Firefly and Gerie apply Grace Marks for continuous DMG, while Shia's Charm Aura control and Freelance Trekker's doubled stats bring both sustain and burst.
SoldierRecommendBuilds.7.1: [Trekker Association: 3 Charm Aura] Suntide Willow Debuff
SoldierRecommendBuilds.7.2: Stacks Trekker Association Assist DMG, while Charm Aura builds up debuffs with unlimited stacks. Linked with Divine Favor and a three-Trait synergy to combo for a great battle performance.
SoldierRecommendBuilds.8.1: [4 Imperial Guard, 2 United Harvest] United Harvest Economy Comp
SoldierRecommendBuilds.8.2: Imperial Guard Economic build. Call to Arms snowballs your advantage by generating extra gold at battle end. Combined with United Harvest, it grants a massive resource advantage in the late game.
